# GateHouse Flutter Renderer

Flutter-specific implementation patterns for the GateHouse renderer. All widgets consume design tokens via `ThemeData` and the GateHouse `GHTokens` extension.

## Token Consumption

Design tokens from [design-tokens.md](design-tokens.md) are implemented as a `ThemeExtension`:

```dart
/// Generated by the renderer from app.yaml theme config
class GHTokens extends ThemeExtension<GHTokens> {
  final GHColorPalette primary;
  final GHColorPalette danger;
  final GHColorPalette success;
  final GHColorPalette warning;
  final GHColorPalette neutral;
  final GHColorPalette info;

  final GHSpacing spacing;
  final GHRadii radii;
  final GHShadows shadows;
  final GHDurations durations;

  // ... constructor, copyWith, lerp
}

class GHColorPalette {
  final Color shade50;
  final Color shade100;
  // ... through shade950
  Color get defaultShade => shade600; // interactive default
  Color get hover => shade700;
  Color get active => shade800;
  Color get bg => shade50;
  Color get border => shade200;
}

class GHSpacing {
  final double space1;  // 4 * density_multiplier
  final double space2;  // 8 * density_multiplier
  // ...
}
```

### Accessing Tokens in Widgets

```dart
// ✅ Correct — tokens from theme
final tokens = Theme.of(context).extension<GHTokens>()!;
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(tokens.spacing.space4),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: tokens.primary.bg,
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(tokens.radii.lg),
    boxShadow: [tokens.shadows.md],
  ),
);

// ❌ Wrong — hardcoded values
Container(
  padding: EdgeInsets.all(16),
  decoration: BoxDecoration(
    color: Color(0xFFEFF6FF),
    borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(8),
  ),
);
```

### ThemeData Integration

The GateHouse tokens integrate with Material 3 `ThemeData`:

```dart
ThemeData buildTheme(AppSpec spec) {
  final tokens = GHTokens.fromSpec(spec.app.theme);

  return ThemeData(
    useMaterial3: true,
    colorScheme: ColorScheme(
      primary: tokens.primary.defaultShade,
      onPrimary: Colors.white,
      error: tokens.danger.defaultShade,
      surface: tokens.neutral.shade50,
      // ...
    ),
    elevatedButtonTheme: ElevatedButtonThemeData(
      style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
        padding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(
          horizontal: tokens.spacing.space4,
          vertical: tokens.spacing.space2,
        ),
        shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
          borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(tokens.radii.md),
        ),
      ),
    ),
    cardTheme: CardTheme(
      elevation: 0,
      shape: RoundedRectangleBorder(
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(tokens.radii.lg),
        side: BorderSide(color: tokens.neutral.shade200),
      ),
    ),
    inputDecorationTheme: InputDecorationTheme(
      border: OutlineInputBorder(
        borderRadius: BorderRadius.circular(tokens.radii.md),
      ),
      contentPadding: EdgeInsets.symmetric(
        horizontal: tokens.spacing.space3,
        vertical: tokens.spacing.space2,
      ),
    ),
    extensions: [tokens],
  );
}
```

## Widget Architecture

### File Structure Convention

```dart
// 1. Imports
import 'package:flutter/material.dart';
import '../tokens/gh_tokens.dart';
import '../data/entity_provider.dart';

// 2. Widget
class EntityListPage extends StatefulWidget {
  final EntitySpec entity;
  final ListViewSpec viewConfig;

  const EntityListPage({
    super.key,
    required this.entity,
    required this.viewConfig,
  });

  @override
  State<EntityListPage> createState() => _EntityListPageState();
}

class _EntityListPageState extends State<EntityListPage> {
  // 3a. State variables
  // 3b. Lifecycle methods
  // 3c. Build method
  // 3d. Private helper methods
}

// 4. Private sub-widgets (co-located if small)
```

### Runtime vs Generated Widgets

**Runtime widgets** (serve mode): Interpret spec at runtime, use dynamic widget construction.

```dart
// Runtime: builds widget tree from spec
class DynamicField extends StatelessWidget {
  final FieldSpec field;
  final dynamic value;
  final ValueChanged<dynamic> onChanged;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return switch (field.type) {
      'string' => StringField(field: field, value: value, onChanged: onChanged),
      'enum' => EnumField(field: field, value: value, onChanged: onChanged),
      'date' => DateField(field: field, value: value, onChanged: onChanged),
      'reference' => ReferenceField(field: field, value: value, onChanged: onChanged),
      _ => Text('Unknown field type: ${field.type}'),
    };
  }
}
```

**Generated widgets** (generate mode): Concrete, typed widgets emitted by Go templates.

```dart
// Generated: specific to one entity
class SubcontractorCreateForm extends StatefulWidget {
  @override
  State<SubcontractorCreateForm> createState() => _SubcontractorCreateFormState();
}

class _SubcontractorCreateFormState extends State<SubcontractorCreateForm> {
  final _formKey = GlobalKey<FormState>();
  final _companyNameController = TextEditingController();
  final _taxIdController = TextEditingController();
  // ... one controller per field, typed and specific
}
```

## State Management

Use **Riverpod** for state management — it aligns well with the spec-driven approach.

### Provider Patterns

```dart
/// Entity list provider — parameterized by resource path and filters
final entityListProvider = FutureProvider.family<PaginatedResponse, EntityListParams>(
  (ref, params) async {
    final client = ref.read(apiClientProvider);
    return client.get(
      params.resource,
      queryParameters: {
        ...params.filters,
        if (params.search != null) 'search': params.search,
        'page_size': params.pageSize,
        if (params.cursor != null) 'cursor': params.cursor,
      },
    );
  },
);

/// Entity detail provider
final entityDetailProvider = FutureProvider.family<Map<String, dynamic>, EntityDetailParams>(
  (ref, params) async {
    final client = ref.read(apiClientProvider);
    return client.get(
      '${params.resource}/${params.id}',
      queryParameters: params.includes != null
          ? {'include': params.includes!.join(',')}
          : null,
    );
  },
);

/// Mutation provider
final entityMutationProvider = Provider((ref) => EntityMutationService(
  client: ref.read(apiClientProvider),
  onSuccess: (resource) {
    ref.invalidate(entityListProvider);
    // invalidate relevant detail providers too
  },
));
```

### Spec Provider

The YAML spec itself is a provider:

```dart
/// In serve mode: fetched from renderer server
final appSpecProvider = FutureProvider<AppSpec>((ref) async {
  final response = await Dio().get('$rendererUrl/_renderer/spec');
  return AppSpec.fromJson(response.data);
});

/// In generated mode: compiled into the app
final appSpecProvider = Provider<AppSpec>((ref) => compiledAppSpec);
```

## Navigation

Use **GoRouter** with routes derived from the YAML spec.

```dart
final routerProvider = Provider<GoRouter>((ref) {
  final spec = ref.read(appSpecProvider).value!;

  return GoRouter(
    routes: [
      ShellRoute(
        builder: (context, state, child) => AppShell(
          navigation: spec.navigation,
          child: child,
        ),
        routes: [
          // Dashboard
          GoRoute(
            path: '/dashboard',
            builder: (context, state) => const DashboardPage(),
          ),
          // Entity routes — generated from spec
          for (final entity in spec.entities) ...[
            GoRoute(
              path: '/${entity.apiResource.replaceFirst('/', '')}',
              builder: (context, state) => EntityListPage(
                entity: entity,
                viewConfig: entity.views.list,
              ),
              routes: [
                GoRoute(
                  path: 'new',
                  builder: (context, state) => EntityCreatePage(entity: entity),
                ),
                GoRoute(
                  path: ':id',
                  builder: (context, state) => EntityDetailPage(
                    entity: entity,
                    id: state.pathParameters['id']!,
                  ),
                  routes: [
                    GoRoute(
                      path: 'edit',
                      builder: (context, state) => EntityEditPage(
                        entity: entity,
                        id: state.pathParameters['id']!,
                      ),
                    ),
                  ],
                ),
              ],
            ),
          ],
          // Custom pages
          for (final page in spec.pages)
            GoRoute(
              path: page.path,
              builder: (context, state) => CustomPage(page: page),
            ),
        ],
      ),
    ],
  );
});
```

## Form Patterns

Forms use Flutter's built-in `Form` widget with per-field validators generated from YAML constraints.

### Validation

```dart
// Generated from YAML field constraints
String? validateCompanyName(String? value) {
  if (value == null || value.isEmpty) return 'Company Name is required';
  if (value.length < 2) return 'Must be at least 2 characters';
  if (value.length > 200) return 'Must be 200 characters or fewer';
  return null;
}

String? validateTaxId(String? value) {
  if (value == null || value.isEmpty) return 'Tax ID is required';
  if (!RegExp(r'^\d{2}-\d{7}$').hasMatch(value)) return 'Must be in format XX-XXXXXXX';
  return null;
}
```

### Stepped Form (Wizard)

```dart
class SteppedForm extends StatefulWidget {
  final List<FormStepSpec> steps;
  final EntitySpec entity;

  @override
  State<SteppedForm> createState() => _SteppedFormState();
}

class _SteppedFormState extends State<SteppedForm> {
  int _currentStep = 0;
  final _stepKeys = <GlobalKey<FormState>>[];
  final _formData = <String, dynamic>{};

  @override
  void initState() {
    super.initState();
    _stepKeys.addAll(
      List.generate(widget.steps.length, (_) => GlobalKey<FormState>()),
    );
  }

  bool _validateCurrentStep() {
    return _stepKeys[_currentStep].currentState?.validate() ?? false;
  }

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    final tokens = Theme.of(context).extension<GHTokens>()!;

    return Stepper(
      currentStep: _currentStep,
      onStepContinue: () {
        if (_validateCurrentStep()) {
          if (_currentStep < widget.steps.length - 1) {
            setState(() => _currentStep++);
          } else {
            _submit();
          }
        }
      },
      onStepCancel: _currentStep > 0
          ? () => setState(() => _currentStep--)
          : null,
      steps: [
        for (int i = 0; i < widget.steps.length; i++)
          Step(
            title: Text(widget.steps[i].title),
            subtitle: widget.steps[i].description != null
                ? Text(widget.steps[i].description!)
                : null,
            isActive: _currentStep >= i,
            content: Form(
              key: _stepKeys[i],
              child: Column(
                children: [
                  for (final field in widget.steps[i].fields)
                    Padding(
                      padding: EdgeInsets.only(bottom: tokens.spacing.space4),
                      child: DynamicField(field: field, /* ... */),
                    ),
                ],
              ),
            ),
          ),
      ],
    );
  }
}
```

## State Transition UI Pattern

```dart
class TransitionButton extends ConsumerWidget {
  final TransitionSpec transition;
  final Map<String, dynamic> record;
  final EntitySpec entity;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) {
    final tokens = Theme.of(context).extension<GHTokens>()!;
    final guardResult = evaluateGuards(transition.guards, record);
    final palette = tokens.paletteForSemantic(transition.color);

    return Tooltip(
      message: guardResult.passed ? '' : guardResult.message,
      child: ElevatedButton.icon(
        onPressed: guardResult.passed
            ? () => _showConfirmation(context, ref)
            : null,
        icon: Icon(LucideIcons.fromName(transition.icon), size: 16),
        label: Text(transition.label),
        style: ElevatedButton.styleFrom(
          backgroundColor: palette.defaultShade,
          foregroundColor: Colors.white,
          disabledBackgroundColor: palette.shade300,
        ),
      ),
    );
  }

  Future<void> _showConfirmation(BuildContext context, WidgetRef ref) async {
    final confirmed = await showDialog<Map<String, dynamic>?>(
      context: context,
      builder: (ctx) => ConfirmTransitionDialog(
        config: transition.confirmation,
        record: record,
      ),
    );

    if (confirmed != null) {
      await ref.read(entityMutationProvider).transition(
        resource: entity.apiResource,
        id: record['id'],
        action: transition.name,
        data: confirmed,
      );
    }
  }
}
```

## Responsive Implementation

Flutter handles responsiveness via `LayoutBuilder` and the GateHouse breakpoint tokens:

```dart
class ResponsiveBuilder extends StatelessWidget {
  final Widget Function(BuildContext, GHBreakpoint) builder;

  @override
  Widget build(BuildContext context) {
    return LayoutBuilder(
      builder: (context, constraints) {
        final breakpoint = GHBreakpoint.fromWidth(constraints.maxWidth);
        return builder(context, breakpoint);
      },
    );
  }
}

enum GHBreakpoint {
  mobile(0),    // < 640
  tablet(640),  // < 1024
  desktop(1024), // < 1280
  wide(1280);   // >= 1280

  final int minWidth;
  const GHBreakpoint(this.minWidth);

  static GHBreakpoint fromWidth(double width) {
    if (width >= 1280) return wide;
    if (width >= 1024) return desktop;
    if (width >= 640) return tablet;
    return mobile;
  }
}

// Usage in entity list:
ResponsiveBuilder(
  builder: (context, breakpoint) {
    if (breakpoint == GHBreakpoint.mobile) {
      return EntityCardList(entity: entity, data: data);  // Cards on mobile
    }
    return EntityDataTable(entity: entity, data: data);   // Table on tablet+
  },
)
```

## Key Package Choices

| Concern | Package | Reason |
|---|---|---|
| State management | `flutter_riverpod` | Provider families match entity parameterization |
| Routing | `go_router` | Declarative, nested routes |
| HTTP client | `dio` | Interceptors for auth, retry |
| Charts | `fl_chart` | Performant, customizable |
| Rich text | `flutter_quill` | Feature-rich editor |
| Data tables | `data_table_2` | Sorting, pagination, fixed columns |
| Date picker | Material `showDatePicker` | Native Material 3 |
| File picker | `file_picker` | Cross-platform |
| Icons | Custom Lucide port or `lucide_icons` | Matches YAML icon names |
| Image | `cached_network_image` | Cache + placeholder |
